message:
fix(e2e): bump hardcoded SQLite version references to 3.52.0 and improve test formatting

Update test fixture version strings from 3.45.x to 3.52.0 to match the
canonical sqlite_version_contract target. Reformat closure-style
benchmark runner calls for readability. Change DEFAULT 3.14 to 2.5 in
insert_default_values test to avoid floating-point representation
edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
